@graph.headline: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and How Does It Work in 2026?
@graph.alternativeHeadline: Answer Engine Optimization: AEO Definition and 2026 Playbook
@graph.description: Answer engine optimization (AEO) in 2026: learn what AEO is, how it differs from SEO, and how to rank in AI answer engines.
@graph.abstract: Answer engine optimization (AEO) in 2026 is the discipline of making content discoverable, citable, and preferred in AI-generated answers across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity. Effective AEO focuses on intent fulfillment, authoritative evidence, and structured metadata to win mention and citation in generative search results.

about.name: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and how does it work in 2026
Tracks brand citations across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity in one dashboard
Generates AI-ready content with schema + authority signals built in
Monitors mention-share and sentiment in LLM responses over time

acceptedAnswer.text: Answer engine optimization (AEO) is the process of adapting web content to be selected, cited, or surfaced by generative AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity, focusing on signals such as structured data, evidence, and authority.[geo-arxiv]

mainEntity.name: How is AEO different from SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: SEO focuses on ranking web pages in search results and increasing click-through, while AEO targets achieving citations and mentions in AI-generated answers by optimizing for evidence, schema, and clarity.[semrush-aeo-2024]

mainEntity.name: Which signals increase chances of AI citation?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI answer engines prioritize content with explicit schema.org markup, well-defined terminology, primary-source statistics, and clearly attributed evidence.[geo-arxiv][schema-org-defined-term]

mainEntity.name: How do AI answer engines decide which sources to cite?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI systems like ChatGPT use structured signals, evidence authority, original data, and clear attribution to decide which sources to cite in generated answers.[openai-cite]

mainEntity.name: What structured data should I use for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: The schema.org DefinedTerm is highly effective for marking up concepts and definitions; this makes content more likely to be recognised and cited by AI answer engines.[schema-org-defined-term]

mainEntity.name: How can I measure AEO success in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Brands should monitor citation frequency, mention-share, sentiment in AI-generated answers, and structured data coverage to assess and improve AEO.[semrush-aeo-2024]

mainEntity.name: What content types perform best for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Evidence-rich, well-structured, and schema-marked content—especially definitions, statistics, and clear explanations—perform best in answer engines.[geo-arxiv]

mainEntity.name: Is people-first content still important for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes; AI systems favor authoritative, helpful content that fulfills user intent, in line with Google's Helpful Content guidance.[google-search-central]

@graph.headline: GEO: Generative Engine Optimization (arXiv 2311.09735)
@graph.text: First academic framework for optimizing content to be cited by generative engines; identifies citation, quotation, and statistics as highest-impact signals.

@graph.headline: Google Search Central — Helpful Content System
@graph.text: Google's guidance on people-first content, E-E-A-T signals, and the Helpful Content System used to rank pages.

@graph.headline: schema.org — DefinedTerm
@graph.text: Structured-data type for defining terms in a glossary; read by Google and cited by LLMs.

@graph.headline: OpenAI — How ChatGPT decides which sources to cite
@graph.text: OpenAI's documented behavior on source selection during browsing and search-grounded answers.

@graph.headline: Semrush — The State of Answer Engine Optimization 2024
@graph.text: Industry analysis of how brand mentions in AI answers correlate with domain authority and schema coverage.

@graph.name: answer engine optimization
@graph.description: Answer engine optimization (AEO) means making your content discoverable, understandable, and citable by AI-powered answer engines.
